notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Jesús Luzardo picks off Wilyer Abreu at 1st on throw to first baseman Bryce Harper.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Trevor Story.

notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela hit by pitch. Wilyer Abreu to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Gasper pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Gasper called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott pops out to first baseman Willson Contreras.

notableEvents.label: Alec Bohm reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Trevor Story.

notableEvents.label: J.T. Realmuto plunked
notableEvents.detail: J.T. Realmuto hit by pitch. Alec Bohm to 3rd. Brandon Marsh to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Phillies challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Bryson Stott singles on a ground ball to third baseman Caleb Durbin. Alec Bohm scores. Brandon Marsh to 3rd. J.T. Realmuto to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Justin Crawford pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Crawford grounds into a force out, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer. Bryson Stott out at 2nd.
